---
title: "Point-treatment g-computation: replicating Hernán & Robins Chapter 13"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Point-treatment g-computation}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

<!-- TODO: write point-treatment vignette -->
<!-- Goal: replicate NHEFS g-formula estimate ~3.5 kg (Chapter 13) -->
<!-- Cover: causat(method = "gcomp"), contrast(), sandwich vs bootstrap SE -->
